input.reason: Dynamic group license assignment failed (CountViolation) for group {{ item().assignedByGroup }}

nonfunctional_fields.name: [BEZ - LISTENER] Licensing: Order Licenses for New Dynamic License Users
nonfunctional_fields.notes[0].content:
Filters `licenseAssignmentStates` for group-based CountViolation errors into `CTX.count_violations`.

**has_violations** (length > 0): Routes to purchase.
**no_violations** (length == 0): Clean exit.
nonfunctional_fields.notes[0].title: ⚖️ Evaluate & Branch
nonfunctional_fields.notes[1].content:
**test_mode** (`CTX.test_user_id|d`): Skips delay, goes direct to Graph check. Sets `CTX.is_test = true`.

**completion_handler** (fallback): Pulls `aad_user_id` from `COMPLETED_WORKFLOW.CTX`, goes through 5-min delay.

Publishes: `CTX.aad_user_id`, `CTX.user_upn`, `CTX.is_test`
nonfunctional_fields.notes[1].title: 🚦 Entry Point & Routing
nonfunctional_fields.notes[2].content:
with_items over `CTX.count_violations` (concurrency: 1). Calls `[REWST - TASK] M365: Purchase Licenses` per SKU.

`purchase_approval_required` = false. Change to true if you want an approval gate.

Once purchased, Entra auto-retries the failed group assignment.
nonfunctional_fields.notes[2].title: 🛒 Purchase Missing Licenses
nonfunctional_fields.notes[3].content: Catches FAILED from Graph API call and purchase sub-workflow. Currently a pass-through to end. Extend with PSA ticket/Teams notification as needed.
nonfunctional_fields.notes[3].title: ⚠️ Failure Handling
nonfunctional_fields.notes[4].content:
GET `/users/{id}?$select=id,displayName,userPrincipalName,assignedLicenses,licenseAssignmentStates`

Looking for: `state == "Error"`, `error == "CountViolation"`, `assignedByGroup != null`

CountViolation = Entra tried to assign a license via a group but tenant had no available units. Published as `CTX.user_license_data`.
nonfunctional_fields.notes[4].title: 🔍 License State Check
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[0].description: Deduplicate violations by SKU and calculate the purchase quantity needed. If available licenses are negative (e.g. -5), purchase enough to reach 1 available (delta = 1 - available).
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[0].name: calculate_purchase_quantities
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[1].description: Give Entra time to evaluate dynamic group membership rules and attempt license assignment after user attributes are set.
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[1].name: delay_for_entra_processing
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[2].name: end
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[3].description: Filter licenseAssignmentStates for CountViolation errors assigned by groups. These are the SKUs that need purchasing.
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[3].name: evaluate_license_states
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[3].next[0].label: test_mode_and_violations
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[3].next[1].label: no_violations
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[3].next[2].label: has_violations
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[4].description: Catches failures from the Graph API call or purchase sub-workflow.
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[4].name: failure_catch
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[5].description: Fetch the tenant's subscribed SKUs to determine available vs consumed license counts for each violation SKU.
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[5].name: get_subscribed_skus
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[6].description: Fetch the user with licenseAssignmentStates to check for CountViolation errors from dynamic group license assignment failures.
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[6].name: get_user_license_states
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[7].description: No CountViolation errors found. User either received licenses successfully or is not in any dynamic license groups.
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[7].name: no_violations_found
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[8].description: Calls the Pax8 license quantity update sub-workflow for each deduplicated SKU with a CountViolation. Iterates via with_items over the calculated purchase list.
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[8].name: purchase_missing_licenses
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[9].description: Entry point. Extracts the onboarded user's AAD ID from the completed onboarding workflow's CTX.
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[9].name: start
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[9].next[0].label: test_mode
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[9].next[1].label: completion_handler
